mapper.insert: insert into batch.retry_schedule ( tenant_id, related_type, related_id, retry_policy, retry_count, max_retry_count, next_retry_at, retry_status, dedup_key, last_error_code, last_error_message ) values ( #{tenantId}, #{relatedType}, #{relatedId}, #{retryPolicy}, #{retryCount}, #{maxRetryCount}, #{nextRetryAt}, #{retryStatus}, #{dedupKey}, #{lastErrorCode}, #{lastErrorMessage} )
mapper.update: update batch.retry_schedule set retry_status = #{successStatus}, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id}

update batch.retry_schedule set retry_status = #{retryStatus}, last_error_code = #{lastErrorCode}, last_error_message = #{lastErrorMessage}, next_retry_at = #{nextRetryAt}, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id}
update batch.retry_schedule set retry_status = #{waitingStatus}, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id}
